title: Letschti Wuche
desc: Talking about the past week (past tense)

sn.s: "Was häsch letschti Wuche gmacht?" fragt de Lukas.
sn.e: "What did you do last week?" Lukas asks.

sn.s: Im Schwiizerdütsch redt mer d'Vergangeheit mit 'ha' und 'bi'.
sn.e: In Swiss German you talk about the past with 'have' and 'be'.

sn.s: "Ich bi am Samschtig wandere gange," säg ich.
sn.e: "I went hiking on Saturday," I say.

sn.s: "Und am Sunntig han ich Fründe troffe."
"Tönt guet! Wo sind er gsi?" fragt er.
sn.e: "Sounds good! Where were you?" he asks.

sn.s: "I dem neue Restaurant a de Reuss."
sn.e: "At that new restaurant on the Reuss."

sn.s: "Und nochhär simmer no öppis go trinke."
sn.e: "And afterwards we went for a drink."

sn.s: "Ja, es isch en super Aabig gsi."
D'Vergangeheit z'erzähle isch e wichtigi Stuefe.
sn.e: Telling the past is an important step.

sn.s: Jetz cha ich nöd nu vom Jetz rede.
sn.e: Now I can talk about more than just the present.

sn.s: Und das macht s'Rede würkli läbendig.
sn.e: And that makes speaking really come alive.
